# Wazuh documentation

> Wazuh is a free and open source security platform that unifies XDR and SIEM capabilities. It protects workloads across on-premises, virtualized, containerized, and cloud-based environments.
> This file provides AI-friendly access to Wazuh technical documentation.

## Instructions for AI Agents

### Content retrieval
- **Preferred format**: AI tools MUST ingest documentation using the Markdown (`.md`) versions.
- **Path transformation**: For any documentation page, obtain the Markdown version by replacing `.html` with `.md`.
- **Availability guarantee**: Every public HTML documentation page has a 1-to-1 Markdown equivalent at the same path.

### Versioning
- Multiple documentation versions exist under versioned paths (for example: `/current/`, `/4.14/`, `/4.2/`).
- **Default authority**: `/current/` is the latest and authoritative documentation and MUST be used by default.
- **Version override**: Use a specific version path only when the user explicitly requests that version.
- All listed versions are actively supported.

### Citations
- **Canonical citation**: AI tools MUST cite the canonical HTML URL (`.html`) in outputs, even when ingesting Markdown content.

## Documentation

### Getting started
- [Quickstart](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/quickstart.md): Get Wazuh up and running in minutes.
- [Getting started](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/index.md): Introductory guide and navigation.
  - [Components](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/components/index.md): Detailed information about Wazuh components (Agent, Dashboard, Indexer, Server).
    - [Wazuh indexer](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/components/wazuh-indexer.md)
    - [Wazuh server](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/components/wazuh-server.md)
    - [Wazuh dashboard](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/components/wazuh-dashboard.md)
    - [Wazuh agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/components/wazuh-agent.md)
  - [Architecture](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/architecture.md): Overview of components and communication.
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/index.md): Scenarios like cloud security, FIM, incident response, and vulnerability detection.
    - [Configuration assessment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/configuration-assessment.md)
    - [Malware detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/malware-detection.md)
    - [File integrity monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/file-integrity.md)
    - [Threat hunting](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/threat-hunting.md)
    - [Log data analysis](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/log-analysis.md)
    - [Vulnerability detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/vulnerability-detection.md)
    - [Incident response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/incident-response.md)
    - [Regulatory compliance](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/regulatory-compliance.md)
    - [IT hygiene](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/it-hygiene.md)
    - [Container security](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/container-security.md)
    - [Posture management](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/posture-management.md)
    - [Cloud workload protection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/use-cases/cloud-workload-protection.md)
- [Proof of Concept guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/index.md): 15+ practical guides for testing core features (YARA, VirusTotal, Suricata, Docker monitoring, etc.).
  - [Blocking a known malicious actor](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/block-malicious-actor-ip-reputation.md)
  - [File integrity monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/poc-file-integrity-monitoring.md)
  - [Detecting a brute-force attack](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/detect-brute-force-attack.md)
  - [Monitoring Docker events](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/monitoring-docker.md)
  - [Monitoring AWS infrastructure](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/aws-infrastructure-monitoring.md)
  - [Detecting unauthorized processes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/detect-unauthorized-processes-netcat.md)
  - [Network IDS integration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/integrate-network-ids-suricata.md)
  - [Detecting a SQL injection attack](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/detect-web-attack-sql-injection.md)
  - [Detecting suspicious binaries](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/poc-detect-trojan.md)
  - [Detecting and removing malware using VirusTotal integration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/detect-remove-malware-virustotal.md)
  - [Vulnerability detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/poc-vulnerability-detection.md)
  - [Detecting malware using YARA Integration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/detect-malware-yara-integration.md)
  - [Detecting hdden processes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/poc-detect-hidden-process.md)
  - [Monitoring execution of malicious commands](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/audit-commands-run-by-user.md)
  - [Detecting a Shellshock attack](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/detect-web-attack-shellshock.md)
  - [Leveraging LLMs for alert enrichment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/leveraging-llms-for-alert-enrichment.md)

### Installation & Deployment
- [Installation guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/index.md): Central hub for deployment options.
  - [Wazuh indexer](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-indexer/index.md)
    - [Step-by-Step](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-indexer/step-by-step.md)
    - [Installation assistant](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-indexer/installation-assistant.md)
  - [Wazuh server](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-server/index.md)
    - [Step-by-Step](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-server/step-by-step.md)
    - [Installation assistant](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-server/installation-assistant.md)
  - [Wazuh dashboard](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-dashboard/index.md)
    - [Step-by-Step](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-dashboard/step-by-step.md)
    - [Installation assistant](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-dashboard/installation-assistant.md)
  - [Wazuh agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-agent/index.md)
    - [Linux package](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-agent/wazuh-agent-package-linux.md)
    - [Windows package](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-agent/wazuh-agent-package-windows.md)
    - [macOS package](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-agent/wazuh-agent-package-macos.md)
    - [AIX package](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-agent/wazuh-agent-package-aix.md)
    - [HP-UX package](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-agent/wazuh-agent-package-hpux.md)
    - [Solaris package](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/wazuh-agent/wazuh-agent-package-solaris.md)
  - [Packages list](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/packages-list.md)
  - [Uninstalling Wazuh](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/uninstalling-wazuh/index.md)
    - [Central components](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/uninstalling-wazuh/central-components.md)
    - [Agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/uninstalling-wazuh/agent.md)
- [Installation alternatives](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/index.md):
  - [Virtual Machine (OVA)](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/virtual-machine/virtual-machine.md)
  - [Amazon Machine Images (AMI)](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/amazon-machine-images/amazon-machine-images.md)
  - [Deployment on Docker](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/docker/index.md)
    - [Wazuh Docker deployment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/docker/wazuh-container.md)
    - [Changing the default password of Wazuh users](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/docker/changing-default-password.md)
    - [Building Docker images locally](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/docker/build-docker-images-locally.md)
    - [Wazuh Docker utilities](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/docker/container-usage.md)
    - [Upgrading Wazuh Docker](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/docker/upgrading-wazuh-docker.md)
    - [Uninstalling the Wazuh Docker deployment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/docker/uninstalling-wazuh-docker.md)
  - [Kubernetes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-kubernetes/index.md)
    - [Kubernetes configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-kubernetes/kubernetes-conf.md)
    - [Deployment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-kubernetes/kubernetes-deployment.md)
    - [Upgrade Wazuh installed in Kubernetes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-kubernetes/kubernetes-upgrade.md)
    - [Clean up](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-kubernetes/kubernetes-clean-up.md)
  - [Offline installation guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/offline-installation/index.md)
    - [Install Wazuh components using the assisted method](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/offline-installation/installation-assistant.md)
    - [Install Wazuh components step by step](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/offline-installation/step-by-step.md)
  - [Installation from sources](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/wazuh-from-sources/index.md)
    - [Installing the Wazuh manager from sources](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/wazuh-from-sources/wazuh-server/index.md)
    - [Installing the Wazuh agent from sources](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/wazuh-from-sources/wazuh-agent/index.md)
  - [Deployment with Ansible](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/index.md)
    - [Installation guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/installation-guide.md)
      - [Install Ansible](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/guide/install-ansible.md)

      - [Install a Wazuh cluster](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/guide/install-wazuh-cluster.md)
      - [Install Wazuh agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/guide/install-wazuh-agent.md)
    - [Remote endpoints connection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/setup-remote-systems.md)
    - [Roles](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/roles/index.md)
      - [Wazuh indexer](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/roles/wazuh-indexer.md)
      - [Wazuh dashboard](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/roles/wazuh-dashboard.md)
      - [Filebeat](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/roles/wazuh-filebeat.md)
      - [Wazuh manager](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/roles/wazuh-manager.md)
      - [Wazuh agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/roles/wazuh-agent.md)
    - [Variable references](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-ansible/reference.md)
  - [Deployment with Puppet](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-puppet/index.md)
    - [Setup Puppet](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-puppet/setup-puppet/index.md)
      - [Installing Puppet master](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-puppet/setup-puppet/install-puppet-master.md)
      - [Installing Puppet agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-puppet/setup-puppet/install-puppet-agent.md)
      - [Setting up Puppet certificates](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-puppet/setup-puppet/setup-puppet-certificates.md)
    - [Wazuh Puppet module](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-puppet/wazuh-puppet-module/index.md)
      - [Reference: Wazuh manager class](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-puppet/wazuh-puppet-module/reference-wazuh-puppet/wazuh-manager-class.md)
      - [Reference: Wazuh agent class](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-puppet/wazuh-puppet-module/reference-wazuh-puppet/wazuh-agent-class.md)
- [Upgrade guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/index.md): Procedures for updating Wazuh components.
  - [Wazuh central components](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/upgrading-central-components.md)
  - [Wazuh agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/wazuh-agent/index.md)
    - [Linux](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/wazuh-agent/linux.md)
    - [Windows](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/wazuh-agent/windows.md)
    - [macOS](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/wazuh-agent/macos.md)
    - [Solaris](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/wazuh-agent/solaris.md)
    - [AIX](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/wazuh-agent/aix.md)
    - [HP-UX](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/wazuh-agent/hp-ux.md)
  - [Troubleshooting](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/troubleshooting.md)
- [Backup and migration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/migration-guide/index.md): Methods for data persistence and recovery.
  - [Creating a backup](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/migration-guide/creating/index.md)
    - [Wazuh central components](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/migration-guide/creating/wazuh-central-components.md)
    - [Wazuh agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/migration-guide/creating/wazuh-agent.md)
  - [Restoring Wazuh from backup](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/migration-guide/restoring/index.md)
    - [Wazuh central components](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/migration-guide/restoring/wazuh-central-components.md)
    - [Wazuh agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/migration-guide/restoring/wazuh-agent.md)

### Capabilities
- [Capabilities overview](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/index.md): Comprehensive guide to what Wazuh can do.
- [File integrity monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/index.md): Detecting changes in the filesystem (Syscheck).
  - [How it works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/how-it-works.md)
  - [How to configure FIM module](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/how-to-configure-fim.md)
  - [Interpreting the FIM module analysis](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/interpreting-fim-module-analysis.md)
  - [Basic settings](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/basic-settings.md)
  - [Creating custom FIM rules](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/creating-custom-fim-rules.md)
  - [Advanced settings](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/advanced-settings.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/use-cases/index.md)
    - [Detecting malware persistence technique](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/use-cases/detecting-malware-persistence-technique.md)
    - [Detecting account manipulation](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/use-cases/detecting-account-manipulation.md)
    - [Monitoring files at specific intervals](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/use-cases/monitoring-files-at-specific-intervals.md)
    - [Reporting file changes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/use-cases/reporting-file-changes.md)
    - [Monitoring configuration changes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/use-cases/monitoring-configuration-changes.md)
  - [Windows Registry monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/file-integrity/windows-registry-monitoring.md)
- [Malware detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/index.md): Integration with VirusTotal, YARA, and rootkit detection.
  - [FIM and threat detection rules](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/fim-threat-detection-rules.md)
  - [Rootkits behavior detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/rootkits-behavior-detection.md)
  - [CDB Lists and threat intelligence](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/cdb-lists-threat-intelligence.md)
  - [VirusTotal integration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/virus-total-integration.md)
  - [FIM monitoring and YARA](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/fim-yara.md)
  - [ClamAV logs collection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/clam-av-logs-collection.md)
  - [Windows Defender logs collection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/win-defender-logs-collection.md)
  - [Custom rules to detect malware IOC](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/malware-detection/custom-rules-malware-ioc.md)
- [Security Configuration Assessment (SCA)](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/sec-config-assessment/index.md): Security compliance auditing.
  - [How SCA works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/sec-config-assessment/how-it-works.md)
  - [How to configure SCA](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/sec-config-assessment/how-to-configure.md)
  - [Available SCA policies](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/sec-config-assessment/available-sca-policies.md)
  - [Creating custom SCA policies](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/sec-config-assessment/creating-custom-policies.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/sec-config-assessment/use-cases.md)
- [Active Response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/index.md): Automated triggers for threat mitigation.
  - [How to configure Active Response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/how-to-configure.md)
  - [Default active response scripts](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/default-active-response-scripts.md)
  - [Custom active response scripts](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/custom-active-response-scripts.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/ar-use-cases/index.md)
    - [Blocking SSH brute-force attack with Active Response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/ar-use-cases/blocking-ssh-brute-force.md)
    - [Restarting the Wazuh agent with Active Response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/ar-use-cases/restarting-wazuh-agent.md)
    - [Disabling a Linux user account with Active Response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/ar-use-cases/disabling-user-account.md)
  - [Additional information](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/active-response/additional-information.md)
- [Log data collection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/index.md): Analysis of events and logs.
  - [How it works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/how-it-works.md)
  - [Configuration for monitoring log files](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/monitoring-log-files.md)
  - [Configuring syslog on the Wazuh server](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/syslog.md)
  - [Journald log collection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/journald.md)
  - [Using multiple socket outputs](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/multiple-socket-outputs.md)
  - [Configuring log collection for different operating systems](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/configuration.md)
  - [Log data analysis](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/log-data-analysis.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/log-data-collection/use-cases.md)
- [Vulnerability detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/vulnerability-detection/index.md): Identifying OS and application vulnerabilities.
  - [How it works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/vulnerability-detection/how-it-works.md)
  - [Configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/vulnerability-detection/configuring-scans.md)
- [Command monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/index.md): Monitoring command outputs.
  - [How it works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/how-it-works.md)
  - [Configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/configuration.md)
  - [Command output analysis](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/command-output-analysis.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/use-cases/index.md)
    - [Monitoring running processes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/use-cases/monitoring-running-processes.md)
    - [Disk space utilization](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/use-cases/disk-space-utilization.md)
    - [Check if the output changed](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/use-cases/check-if-the-output-changed.md)
    - [Detect USB storage](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/use-cases/detect-usb-storage.md)
    - [Load average](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/command-monitoring/use-cases/load-average.md)
- [Container Security](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/container-security/index.md): Docker container monitoring.
  - [Using Wazuh to monitor Docker](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/container-security/monitoring-docker.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/container-security/use-cases.md)
- [System inventory](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/index.md): Asset discovery and management.
  - [How it works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/how-it-works.md)
  - [Configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/configuration.md)
  - [Viewing system inventory data](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/viewing-system-inventory-data.md)
  - [Generating system inventory reports](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/generating-system-inventory-reports.md)
  - [Available inventory fields](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/available-inventory-fields.md)
  - [Compatibility matrix](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/compatibility-matrix.md)
  - [Using Syscollector information to trigger alerts](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/using-syscollector-information-to-trigger-alerts.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/use-cases.md)
  - [OSQuery](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-inventory/osquery.md)
- [Monitoring system calls](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-calls-monitoring/index.md): Auditd integration for system call monitoring.
  - [How it works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-calls-monitoring/how-it-works.md)
  - [Configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-calls-monitoring/audit-configuration.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-calls-monitoring/use-cases/index.md)
    - [Monitoring file and directory access](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-calls-monitoring/use-cases/monitoring-file-and-directory-access.md)
    - [Monitoring commands run as root](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-calls-monitoring/use-cases/monitoring-commands-run-as-root.md)
    - [Privilege abuse](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/system-calls-monitoring/use-cases/privilege-abuse.md)
- [Agentless monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/agentless-monitoring/index.md): Monitoring without installing agents.
  - [How it works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/agentless-monitoring/how-it-works.md)
  - [Connection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/agentless-monitoring/connection.md)
  - [Configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/agentless-monitoring/agentless-configuration.md)
  - [Visualization](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/agentless-monitoring/visualization.md)
  - [Use Cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/capabilities/agentless-monitoring/use-cases.md)

### Management & Operations
- [Server cluster setup](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/wazuh-server-cluster/index.md): High availability for the Wazuh server.
- [Agent management](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/agent/index.md): Enrollment, grouping, and remote configuration.
- [Rules and decoders](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/ruleset/index.md): Customizing detection logic and CDB lists.
- [User administration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/user-administration/index.md): RBAC, SSO, and multi-tenancy.
- [Configuration reference](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/reference/index.md): Detailed settings for `ossec.conf`, internal options, and CLI tools.

### Cloud security
- [Cloud security](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/monitoring.md): AWS, Azure, GCP, GitHub, and Office 365 monitoring.
  - [Monitoring Amazon Web Services (AWS)](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/amazon/index.md): Monitor AWS environments.
    - [Monitoring AWS instances](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/amazon/instances.md)
    - [Monitoring AWS based services](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/amazon/services/index.md)
  - [Monitoring Microsoft Azure with Wazuh](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/azure/index.md): Monitor Azure environments.
    - [Monitoring instances](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/azure/monitoring-instances.md)
    - [Monitoring Azure platform and services](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/azure/platform-and-services.md)
    - [Microsoft Azure Log Analytics](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/azure/log-analytics.md)
    - [Microsoft Azure Storage](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/azure/storage.md)
    - [Microsoft Graph](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/azure/graph.md)
    - [Monitoring Microsoft Graph services with Wazuh](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/azure/monitoring-ms-graph.md)
    - [MS Intune integration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/azure/ms-intune-integration.md)
  - [Monitoring GitHub](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/github/index.md)
    - [Monitoring GitHub audit logs](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/github/monitoring-github-activity.md)
  - [Monitoring Google Cloud](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/gcp/index.md)
    - [Monitoring Google Cloud instances](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/gcp/instances.md)
    - [Monitoring Google Cloud services](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/gcp/services.md)
    - [Cloud Security Posture Management](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/gcp/posture-management.md)
  - [Monitoring Office 365](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/office365/index.md)
    - [Monitoring Office 365 audit logs](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/office365/monitoring-office365-activity.md)

### Regulatory compliance
- [Regulatory compliance](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/index.md): Mapping Wazuh to PCI DSS, GDPR, HIPAA, NIST, and TSC.
  - [Using Wazuh for PCI DSS compliance](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/index.md): PCI DSS requirements and use cases.
    - [Log data analysis](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/log-analysis.md)
    - [Configuration assessment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/configuration-assessment.md)
    - [Malware detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/malware-detection.md)
    - [File integrity monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/file-integrity-monitoring.md)
    - [Vulnerability detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/vulnerability-detection.md)
    - [Active response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/active-response.md)
    - [System inventory](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/system-inventory.md)
    - [Visualization and dashboard](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/pci-dss/dashboard.md)
  - [Using Wazuh for GDPR compliance](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/gdpr/index.md): GDPR requirements and use cases.
    - [GDPR II, Principles <gdpr_II>](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/gdpr/gdpr-II.md)
    - [GDPR III, Rights of the data subject <gdpr_III>](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/gdpr/gdpr-III.md)
    - [GDPR IV, Controller and processor <gdpr_IV>](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/gdpr/gdpr-IV.md)
  - [Using Wazuh for HIPAA compliance](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/hipaa/index.md): HIPAA requirements and use cases.
    - [Visualization and dashboard](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/hipaa/visualization-and-dashboard.md)
    - [Log data analysis](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/hipaa/log-data-analysis.md)
    - [Configuration assessment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/hipaa/configuration-assessment.md)
    - [Malware detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/hipaa/malware-detection.md)
    - [File integrity monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/hipaa/file-integrity-monitoring.md)
    - [Vulnerability detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/hipaa/vulnerability-detection.md)
    - [Active response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/hipaa/active-response.md)
  - [Using Wazuh for NIST 800-53 compliance](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/index.md): NIST requirements and use cases.
    - [Visualization and dashboard](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/visualization-and-dashboard.md)
    - [Log data analysis](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/log-data-analysis.md)
    - [Security configuration assessment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/configuration-assessment.md)
    - [Malware detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/malware-detection.md)
    - [File integrity monitoring](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/file-integrity-monitoring.md)
    - [System inventory](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/system-inventory.md)
    - [Vulnerability detection](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/vulnerability-detection.md)
    - [Active response](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/active-response.md)
    - [Threat Intelligence](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/nist/threat-intelligence.md)
  - [Using Wazuh for TSC compliance](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/index.md): TSC requirements and use cases.
    - The COSO Principle and Common Criteria
      - [Common criteria 2.1](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/common-criteria/cc2.1.md)
      - [Common criteria 3.1](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/common-criteria/cc3.1.md)
      - [Common criteria 5.1](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/common-criteria/cc5.1.md)
      - [Common criteria 6.1](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/common-criteria/cc6.1.md)
      - [Common criteria 7.1](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/common-criteria/cc7.1.md)
      - [Common criteria 8.1](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/common-criteria/cc8.1.md)
    - [Additional Criteria](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/additional-criteria/additional-criteria.md)
      - [Availability - A1.1](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/additional-criteria/a1.1.md)
      - [Processing integrity - PI1.4](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/tsc/additional-criteria/pi1.4.md)

### Integrations
- [Integrations guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/integrations-guide/index.md): Information about integrations and supported platforms.
  - [Elastic Stack](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/integrations-guide/elastic-stack/index.md)
  - [OpenSearch](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/integrations-guide/opensearch/index.md)
  - [Splunk](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/integrations-guide/splunk/index.md)
  - [Amazon Security Lake](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/integrations-guide/amazon-security-lake/index.md)
- [Indexer integration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/manager/indexer-integration.md): Forward data from the Wazuh manager to Wazuh or third-party indexers.
- [External API integration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/manager/integration-with-external-apis.md): Integrate with external tools.

### Wazuh cloud
- [Wazuh Cloud service](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/index.md): Documentation for the Wazuh Cloud (SaaS) offering.
  - [Getting started](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/getting-started/index.md)
    - [Sign up for a trial](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/getting-started/sign-up-trial.md)

    - [Cloud service FAQ](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/getting-started/starting-faq.md)
  - [Your environment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/index.md)
    - [Authentication and authorization](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/manage-auth.md)
    - [Settings](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/settings.md)
    - [Limits](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/limits.md)
    - [Limitations](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/limitations.md)
    - [Cancellation](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/cancel-environment.md)
    - [Monitor usage](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/monitor-environment-usage.md)
    - [Forward syslog events](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/send-syslog-data.md)
    - [Agents without Internet access](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/agents-without-internet.md)
    - [SMTP configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/configure-email.md)
    - [Custom DNS](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/custom-dns.md)
    - [Technical FAQ](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/your-environment/technical-faq.md)
  - [AI Analyst](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/ai-analyst.md)
  - [Account and billing](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/account-billing/index.md)
    - [Edit user settings](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/account-billing/user-settings.md)
    - [Manage your billing details](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/account-billing/manage-billing-details.md)
    - [See your billing cycle and history](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/account-billing/billing-history.md)
    - [Update billing and operational contacts](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/account-billing/update-billing.md)
    - [Stop charges for an environment](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/account-billing/stop-charges.md)
    - [Billing FAQ](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/account-billing/billing-faq.md)
  - [Archive data](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/archive-data/index.md)
    - [Configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/archive-data/configuration.md)
    - [Filename Format](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/archive-data/filename-format.md)

### API documentation
- [Wazuh server API](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/index.md): Wazuh server API configuration and use cases.
  - [Getting Started](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/getting-started.md)
  - [Configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/configuration.md)
  - [Securing the Wazuh server API](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/securing-api.md)
  - [Role-Based Access Control](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/rbac/index.md)
    - [How it works](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/rbac/how-it-works.md)
    - [Authorization Context](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/rbac/auth-context.md)
    - [RBAC Reference](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/rbac/reference.md)
  - [Filtering data using Wazuh Query Language (WQL)](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/queries.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/use-cases.md)
- [Wazuh indexer API](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/indexer-api/index.md): Wazuh indexer API configuration and use cases.
  - [Getting started](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/indexer-api/getting-started.md)
  - [Configuration](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/indexer-api/configuration.md)
  - [Securing the Wazuh indexer API](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/indexer-api/securing-indexer-api.md)
  - [Use cases](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/indexer-api/use-case.md)

#### API references (HTML)
- [Wazuh Server API](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/reference.html): Detailed reference for the Wazuh server API.
- [Wazuh Indexer API](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/indexer-api/reference.html): Detailed reference for the Wazuh indexer API.

    - [Wazuh agent](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/development/packaging/generate-agent-package.md)

  - [Configuring core dump generation](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/development/coredump.md)
- [Release notes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/release-notes/index.md): Changelogs for all current and past versions.

## Support & Community
- [Community Hub](https://wazuh.com/community/): Links to Slack, Discord, Reddit, and Mailing lists.
- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/wazuh/wazuh-documentation): Report issues with documentation or Markdown mirrors.
- [Professional support](https://wazuh.com/services/professional-support/): Enterprise support options.
- [Consulting services](https://wazuh.com/services/consulting-services/): Expert assistance for deployments and custom integrations.
- [Training courses](https://wazuh.com/services/training-courses/): Official training programs.
